mapper.insert: INSERT INTO portfolio (portfolio_id, user_id, ticker, stock_name, quantity, buy_price, buy_date) VALUES (portfolio_seq.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{ticker}, #{stockName}, #{quantity}, #{buyPrice}, #{buyDate})
mapper.select: SELECT portfolio_id, user_id, ticker, stock_name, quantity, buy_price, buy_date, TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS created_at FROM portfolio WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
